options.name: --logLevel
options.description: Set log level (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical)

options.name: --msbuildPath
options.description: Use a specific MSBuild path for project loading

options.name: --debug
options.description: Wait for debugger to attach before starting

options.name: --help
options.description:
Show this help message
Transport:
Named pipe transport (default) outputs the pipe name as JSON to stdout:
{"pipeName": "\\\\.\\pipe\\vbnet-lsp-XXXXXXXX"}
The client should connect to this pipe for bidirectional LSP communication.
Stdio transport uses stdin/stdout for LSP messages with Content-Length headers.
